name: Blueberry or Cherry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup frozen or canned tart cherries (drained)
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 12 - 14
1. Place paper cups in an ungreased muffin tin.
2. Sift dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
3. Add blueberries or cherries to the dry mix and stir until well coated.
4. In a small bowl, beat eggs well. Add melted butter and milk.
5. Quickly stir the liquid mixture into the dry mix. Do not overmix; overblending can cause a tough texture.
6. Fill muffin cups 3/4 full and sprinkle lightly with cinnamon topping.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until brown.
